IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: INVESTING CHARITABLE CAPITAL TO CREATE ECONOMIC, SOCIAL, AND SPIRITUAL TRANSFORMATION
IRS990.MissionDesc: INVESTING CHARITABLE CAPITAL TO CREATE ECONOMIC, SOCIAL, AND SPIRITUAL TRANSFORMATION
IRS990.Desc: THE ORGANIZATION FUNDS PROJECTS WITH A CHARITABLE PURPOSE OR A MISSION THAT ALIGNS WITH CHARITABLE CAUSES IN ADDITION TO PROVIDING A RETURN FOR FUTURE GRANTMAKING ACTIVITIES TO CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S PROGRAM SERVICE ACTIVITIES SUPPORT ITS SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION, IMPACT INVESTING CHARITABLE FOUNDATION.
SEE SCHEDULE I PAGE ONE FOR OTHER GRANT INFORMATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: INCOME TAX EXPENSE IS RECORDED FOR ACTIVITIES THAT GENERATE UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME. THE FOUNDATION GENERATES TAXABLE INCOME AND LOSS THROUGH INVESTMENT TRANSACTIONS. THE FOUNDATION ACCEPTS DONATIONS OF S-CORPORATION STOCK AND MAY INVEST IN S-CORPORATION STOCK DIRECTLY. DURING THE HOLDING PERIOD, THE FOUNDATION'S SHARE OF S-CORPORATION INCOME IS TAXABLE. FURTHER, A TAXABLE CAPITAL GAIN MAY BE GENERATED UPON SALE OF THE STOCK. SIMILARLY, THE FOUNDATION RECEIVES INTERESTS AND DIRECTLY INVESTS IN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES ("LLC"S). INCOME FROM LLCS MAY OR MAY NOT BE TAXABLE DEPENDING UPON THE CHARACTER OF THE INCOME AND IF THE ACTIVITY OF THE LLC IS RELATED TO THE FOUNDATION'S EXEMPT PURPOSE. THE FOUNDATION'S POLICY IS TO RECORD A LIABILITY FOR ANY TAX POSITION THAT IS BENEFICIAL TO THE FOUNDATION, INCLUDING ANY RELATED INTEREST AND PENALTIES, WHEN IT IS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT THE POSITION TAKEN BY MANAGEMENT WITH RESPECT TO THE TRANSACTION OR CLASS OF TRANSACTIONS WILL BE OVERTURNED BY A TAXING AUTHORITY UPON EXAMINATION. MANAGEMENT BELIEVES THERE ARE NO SUCH POSITIONS AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2024, AND ACCORDINGLY, NO LIABILITY HAS BEEN ACCRUED.
THE ORGANIZATION HAS ATTACHED FORM 926 AS REQUIRED FOR TRANSFERS FOR FOREIGN INVESTMENTS.
THE FORM 5471 HAS BEEN PREPARED AS REQUIRED.
THE ORGANIZATION GRANTS FUNDS TO ITS SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION AND GRANTS TO OTHER ORGANIZATIONS AS DIRECTED BY THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION.

THE RELATED ORGANIZATION USES A COMPENSATION COMMITTEE, FORM 990'S OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS, AND COMPENSATION SURVEYS TO ESTABLISH THE COMPENSATION OF THE CEO AND CIO. THE BOARD APPROVES THE COMPENSATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION HAS THE POWER TO APPOINT TRUSTEES AND ONE TRUSTEE MUST BE A DELAWARE RESIDENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL AND TOP FINANCIAL OFFICIAL EACH REVIEW THE FORM 990 PRIOR TO ITS FILING WITH THE IRS. A COPY OF THE FINAL FORM 990 IS ALSO PROVIDED TO THE VOTING MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZAION'S GOVERNING BODY PRIOR TO ITS FILING WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION REQUIRES THAT EACH MEMBER ANNUALLY PROVIDE A STATEMENT DISCLOSING ANY POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST, AND APPROPRIATE ACTION IS TAKEN. MEMBERS WITH A CONFLICT OF INTEREST RECUSE THEMSELVES FROM ANY DISCUSSION AND DECISION MAKING RELATED TO THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT COMPENSATE ANY OFFICERS OR DIRECTORS. THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION HAS ADOPTED AN EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION SETTING POLICY APPLICABLE TO ALL DISQUALIFIED PERSONS, INCLUDING THE ORGANIZATION'S CEO AND CIO. UNDER THE POLICY, THE FINANCE AUDIT COMPENSATION COMMITTEE ANNUALLY REVIEWS AND APPROVES THE COMPENSATION LEVELS OF THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR/PRESIDENT. THE COMPENSATION APPROVAL PROCESS INCLUDES REVIEW OF A COMPENSATION SURVEY TO DETERMINE REASONABLE COMPENSATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDES, UPON REQUEST, COPIES OF ITS ARTICLES OF INCORPORATION, BYLAWS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, FORM 1023, AND ITS FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.

RelatedOrganizationName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: FLORIDA HURRICANE DISASTER RELIEF FUND LLC
FUND I A SERIES OF MANAS ECOSYSTEMS FUND LLC
HIBM HER INESCAPABLE BRAVE MISSION LLC
SOVERIGN'S CAPITAL REAL ESTATE FUND II LP
WISE ROCK LLC--CONVERTED TO PARTNERSHIP DURING 2024

OtherOrganizationName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: FLORIDA HURRICANE DISASTER RELIEF FUND LLC
FUND I A SERIES OF MANS ECOSYSTEM FUND LLC
SOVERIGN'S CAPITAL REAL ESTATE FUND II LP
